title: Write numbers in word and expanded form
description: Write numbers in word and expanded form within 1000.
topic_path: Numbers in standard, word, and expanded form
Write numbers in word and expanded form

hints:
First, let's turn our number into standard form.

Hundreds | Tens |  Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\blueE3$ | $\maroonD7$ | $\purpleD9$

$\blueE{300} + \maroonD{70} + \purpleD9 = \blueE3\maroonD7\purpleD9$

Now, let's say the number $\blueE3\maroonD7\purpleD9$ out loud and write it in written form.

$\blueE{\text{three hundred}}\maroonD{\text{ seventy-}}\purpleD{\text{nine}}$
$300 + 70 + 9$ is written as three hundred seventy-nine.

First, let's turn our number into standard form.

Hundreds | Tens |  Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\blueE6$ | $\maroonD1$ | $\purpleD3$

$\blueE{600} + \maroonD{10} + \purpleD3 = \blueE6\maroonD1\purpleD3$

Now, let's say the number $\blueE6\maroonD1\purpleD3$ out loud and write it in written form.

$\blueE{\text{six hundred}}\purpleD{\text{ thir}}\maroonD{\text{teen}}$
$600 + 10 + 3$ is written as six hundred thirteen.

First, let's turn our number into standard form.

Hundreds | Tens |  Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\blueE8$ | $\maroonD2$ | $\purpleD0$

$\blueE{800} + \maroonD{20} + \purpleD0= \blueE8\maroonD2\purpleD0$

Now, let's say the number $\blueE8\maroonD2\purpleD0$ out loud and write it in written form.

$\blueE{\text{eight hundred}}\maroonD{\text{ twenty}}$
$800 + 20$ is written as eight hundred twenty.

First, let's turn our number into standard form.

Hundreds | Tens |  Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\blueE5$ | $\maroonD0$ | $\purpleD4$

$\blueE{500} + \maroonD{0} + \purpleD4 = \blueE5\maroonD0\purpleD4$

Now, let's say the number $\blueE5\maroonD0\purpleD4$ out loud and write it in written form.

$\blueE{\text{five hundred}}\purpleD{\text{ four}}$
$500 + 4$ is written as five hundred four.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Write "six hundred fifty" in expanded form.**

[[â˜ƒ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's use a place value chart to write $\blueE{\text{six hundred}}\maroonD{\text{ fifty}}$ in standard form.

 Hundreds | Tens |  Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\blueE6$ | $\maroonD5$ | $0$
Six hundred fifty in expanded form is ${600} + {50}$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Write "seven hundred forty-two" in expanded form.**

[[â˜ƒ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's use a place value chart to write $\blueE{\text{seven hundred}}\maroonD{\text{ forty-}}\purpleD{\text{two}}$ in standard form.

 Hundreds | Tens |  Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\blueE7$ | $\maroonD4$ | $\purpleD2$

Now, let's turn $\blueE7\maroonD4\purpleD2$ into expanded form.

$\begin{align}
\blueE7\text{ hundreds} &=\blueE{700}\\\\
\maroonD4\text{ tens} &=\maroonD{40}\\\\
\purpleD2{\text{ ones}}&=\purpleD2
\end{align}$

$\blueE{700} + \maroonD{40} + \purpleD2$
Seven hundred forty-two in expanded form is ${700} + {40} + 2$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Write "one hundred eighty-three" in expanded form.**

[[â˜ƒ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's use a place value chart to write $\blueE{\text{one hundred}}\maroonD{\text{ eighty-}}\purpleD{\text{three}}$ in standard form.

 Hundreds | Tens |  Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\blueE1$ | $\maroonD8$ | $\purpleD3$

Now, let's turn $\blueE1\maroonD8\purpleD3$ into expanded form.

$\begin{align}
\blueE1\text{ hundred} &=\blueE{100}\\\\
\maroonD8\text{ tens} &=\maroonD{80}\\\\
\purpleD3{\text{ ones}}&=\purpleD3
\end{align}$

$\blueE{100} + \maroonD{80} + \purpleD3$
One hundred eighty-three in expanded form is ${100} + {80} + 3$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Write "nine hundred one" in expanded form.**

[[â˜ƒ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's use a place value chart to write $\blueE{\text{nine hundred}}\purpleD{\text{ one}}$ in standard form.

 Hundreds | Tens |  Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\blueE9$ | $\maroonD0$ | $\purpleD1$

Now, let's turn $\blueE9\purpleD0\maroonD1$ into expanded form.


$\begin{align}
\blueE9\text{ hundreds} &=\blueE{900}\\\\
\maroonD0\text{ tens} &=\maroonD{0}\\\\
\purpleD1{\text{ one}}&=\purpleD1
\end{align}$

$\blueE{900} +\purpleD1$
Nine hundred one in expanded form is ${900} + 1$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match the written form and expanded form that describe the same number.**

[[â˜ƒ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each written form one at a time.  

$\blueE{\text{ Two hundred }} \maroonD{\text{twenty}} =\blueE{200} + \maroonD{20}$
$\blueE{\text{ Two hundred }} \purpleD{\text{two}} =\blueE{200} + \purpleD2$
$\blueE{\text{ Two hundred }} \maroonD{\text{twenty-}}\purpleD{\text{two}} =\blueE{200}+\maroonD{20}+\purpleD2$

Here is the completed table:

Written form | Expanded form
:-: | :-: 
Two hundred twenty | $200 + 20$
Two hundred two | $200 + 2$
Two hundred twenty-two | $200 + 20 + 2$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match the written form and expanded form that describe the same number.**

[[â˜ƒ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each written form one at a time.  

$\blueE{\text{ Seven hundred }} \maroonD{\text{seventy}} =\blueE{700} + \maroonD{70}$
$\blueE{\text{Seven hundred }} \maroonD{\text{seventy-}}\purpleD{\text{seven}} =\blueE{700}+\maroonD{70}+\purpleD7$
$\blueE{\text{Seven hundred }} \purpleD{\text{seven}} =\blueE{700} + \purpleD7$

Here is the completed table:

Written form | Expanded form
:-: | :-: 
Seven hundred seventy | $700 + 70$
Seven hundred seventy-seven | $700 + 70 +7$
Seven hundred seven | $700 + 7$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match the expanded form and written form that describe the same number.**

[[â˜ƒ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each expanded form one at a time.  

$\blueE{400} + \maroonD{40} + \purpleD3 = \blueE{\text{ Four hundred }} \maroonD{\text{forty-}}\purpleD{\text{three}}$
$\blueE{400}+\purpleD3 = \blueE{\text{Four hundred }} \purpleD{\text{three}}$
$\blueE{400} + \maroonD{30} = \blueE{\text{Four hundred }} \maroonD{\text{thirty}}$

Here is the completed table:

Expanded form | Written form
:-: | :-: 
$400 + 40 +3$ | Four hundred forty-three
$400 + 3$ | Four hundred three
$400 + 30$ | Four hundred thirty

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match the expanded form and written form that describe the same number.**

[[â˜ƒ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each expanded form one at a time.  

$\blueE{500} +  \purpleD5 = \blueE{\text{Five hundred }} \purpleD{\text{five}}$
$\blueE{500}+\maroonD{10}+\purpleD5 = \blueE{\text{Five hundred }}\purpleD{\text{fif}}\maroonD{\text{teen}}$
$\blueE{500} + \maroonD{50} + \purpleD5 = \blueE{\text{Five hundred }} \maroonD{\text{fifty-}}\purpleD{\text{five}}$

Here is the completed table:

Expanded form | Written form
:-: | :-: 
$500 + 5$ | Five hundred five
$500 + 10 +5$ | Five hundred fifteen
$500 + 50 + 5$ | Five hundred fifty-five
